---
title: "Untitled" 
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
d_logL<-read.csv("data/figure_2_dlikelihood_predictions_error.csv")%>%filter( calculus=="primitive",component_path=="logL")%>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.))))
d_logL
```


```{r}
d_logL%>%filter(calculus=="primitive")%>%select(value)%>%pull()
```

```{r}
d_logL%>%filter(calculus=="derivative")%>%select(value)%>%pull()
```
